layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-2, p-4, p-6, p-8. Use generous padding inside cards.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid. Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. Gap gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Fixed left w-64, solid white background, 1px right border (border-slate-200).
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense data and tabular content. Optical alignment for icons within buttons.

components_strategy.buttons: Shadcn primitives. Primary: bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-md. Include hover state and focus rings.
components_strategy.cards: Flat white background (bg-white), 1px border (border-slate-200), subtle shadow (shadow-sm). No heavy shadows.
components_strategy.tables: Shadcn Table. Use F-pattern for column layout. Statuses must be Shadcn Badges with corresponding colors.
components_strategy.forms: Shadcn Forms. Input, Select, and Dialogs. Labels should be text-sm text-slate-600.
components_strategy.tabs: Shadcn Tabs used for separating Residences in the Apartments page.
components_strategy.badges: Rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium. Use color tinting (e.g., bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 for Available).

design_rules.anti_patterns: No generic 'Inter' for headings. No full-screen gradients. Do not center data tables or forms.
design_rules.motion: Use framer-motion for staggering list items. Include simple transition-all duration-200 on interactive elements.
design_rules.accessibility: Always ensure >4.5:1 text contrast. Include aria-labels. Keep focus states visible.
design_rules.data_testid: MANDATORY: Add data-testid to all interactive elements, buttons, inputs, tabs, and rows.

images.description: Modern apartment building exterior used as a thumbnail for residences in the dashboard.
Photo of the sales team or default user avatars.
3D WhatsApp icon used in the AI integration widget or dashboard card.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React for all sidebar icons, action icons, and status indicators.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup fonts: Import 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts and configure them in tailwind.config.js.
2. Interface is strictly in French (Tableau de bord, Clients, Appartements, Paramètres, IA WhatsApp).
3. Layout: Create a DashboardLayout with a Sidebar (w-64) and a Main Content area. Include a top header showing 'Utilisateur en ligne: Commercial 1' to mock multi-user sync.
4. Dashboard View: Grid layout with KPIs (Total Clients, Available Apts, Reserved Apts). Add a section for 'Dernières Activités' and 'Statut IA WhatsApp'.
5. Clients View: Use Shadcn Table. Columns: Nom, Téléphone, Email, Salaire, Situation, Statut, Appartement, Actions. Build a Dialog with Shadcn Forms to Add/Edit clients. Include the tracking status.

6. Appartements View: Use Shadcn Tabs to separate 'Résidence A', 'Résidence B', 'Résidence C' (names editable in settings). Display cards or table for F2, F3, F4. Fields: Prix, Étage, Statut. Auto-sync logic: If a linked client is 'Réservé', the apartment must be marked 'Réservé'.
7. IA WhatsApp View: A mock configuration interface showing AI prompt settings and a feed of recent automated lead interactions.
8. Testing: Apply data-testid to all forms, buttons, inputs, and tabs. Ensure Shadcn select and dialog are fully styled.
9. Theme: Keep it light, professional, and dense (Control Room Grid). Do not use dark mode colors unless explicitly requested.
